run_read.description: Read a text file. Shows first 40 lines by default. For large files, use run_search instead.

run_write.description: Write provided content to a UTF-8 text file.

run_exec.description: Execute provided Python code in a subprocess.

run_str_replace.description: Surgical find-and-replace in a file. Pass JSON on stdin: {"path": "...", "old": "...", "new": "..."}

run_bash.description: Execute a shell command with timeout.

run_git.description: Git operations. Args: subcommand [args...]. Allowed: status, diff, log, add, commit, branch, checkout, stash, show, reset, rev-parse, remote.

run_search.description: Search for text in files. Args: pattern [path]. Example: run_search version setup.bat

run_tree.description: Recursive directory tree listing. Args: [path] [--depth N]. Default depth 4.

run_test.description: Run a test command and report pass/fail. Args: command.

run_sql.description: Execute a SQLite query. Args: db_path, query. SELECT returns a table; writes report rows affected.

run_integrity.description: File integrity checker. Args: [path] [--baseline]. Without --baseline, compares current files against saved hashes.
